'''jahogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uveovortex|uveovortex]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uveovortex|uveovortex]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jahogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæhegeth|jæhegeth]] || [[word:jæhegej|jæhegej]] || [[word:jæhegesh|jæhegesh]] || [[word:jæhege|jæhege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jahohogoth|jahohogoth]] || [[word:jahohogoj|jahohogoj]] || [[word:jahohogosh|jahohogosh]] || [[word:jahohogo|jahohogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jahogoth|jahogoth]] || [[word:jahogoj|jahogoj]] || [[word:jahogosh|jahogosh]] || [[word:jahogo|jahogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jahofgoth|jahofgoth]] || [[word:jahofgoj|jahofgoj]] || [[word:jahofgosh|jahofgosh]] || [[word:jahofgof|jahofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jahogotho|jahogotho]] || [[word:jahogojo|jahogojo]] || [[word:jahogosho|jahogosho]] || [[word:jahogoko|jahogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jahogoth|jahogoth]] || [[word:jahogoj|jahogoj]] || [[word:jahogosh|jahogosh]] || [[word:jahogo|jahogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jahogothol|jahogothol]] || [[word:jahogojol|jahogojol]] || [[word:jahogoshol|jahogoshol]] || [[word:jahogokol|jahogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jahogothotho|jahogothotho]] || [[word:jahogojojo|jahogojojo]] || [[word:jahogoshosho|jahogoshosho]] || [[word:jahogoko|jahogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jahogothon|jahogothon]] || [[word:jahogojon|jahogojon]] || [[word:jahogoshon|jahogoshon]] || [[word:jahogokon|jahogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jahogothoro|jahogothoro]] || [[word:jahogojoro|jahogojoro]] || [[word:jahogoshoro|jahogoshoro]] || [[word:jahogokoro|jahogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
